The kernel now launches `SPLIT_K_SLICES = 2`, keeps the existing 128x128 / 4-wave MFMA layout, accumulates per-split fp32 partials into a flat fp32 workspace with `S.amdgpu.buffer_atomic_add_f32`, and runs a second kernel to remap that GEMM-major workspace back to bf16 NCHW output.
